name: Anhui Ankai Automobile Co., Ltd
summary: Anhui Ankai Automobile Co., Ltd manufactures and sells large, medium, and light buses and automotive parts in China. The company offers various coaches, city buses, school buses, and new energy buses. It exports its products to Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Malaysia, the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, the United Kingdom, Russia, the United States, Australia, Colombia, Ghana, and internationally. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Hefei, China. Anhui Ankai Automobile Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Co., Ltd.
